nodes.label: AI as intelligent search and synthesis tool
nodes.label_negative: AI as unreliable or opaque information source
nodes.grounding_span: use AI as a more intelligent search engine, to compile results on sometimes quite obscure or difficult-to-find sources and then perform synthesis or process on them into a usable data format

nodes.label: AI trustworthiness and accuracy
nodes.grounding_span: I don't trust AI to make that level of decisions yet

nodes.label: AI delegation based on verifiability
nodes.label_negative: AI delegation for unverifiable or high-stakes decisions
nodes.grounding_span: If it is something that from my experience I can immediately sense-check the result of just from looking at it then I will delegate it to AI

nodes.label: AI transparency about uncertainty
nodes.grounding_span: if the models start stating when they are unsure of an answer rather than hallucinating

nodes.label: AI capability for complex multi-step tasks
nodes.label_negative: AI limited to simple step-by-step tasks
nodes.grounding_span: I will become more confident in increasing the number of steps I give them to do in one go

nodes.label: Research efficiency and productivity
nodes.grounding_span: improves their productivity and so now wouldn't do without it

nodes.label: Decision accountability and transparency
nodes.grounding_span: the decision-making process needed to be fully understood and transparent

nodes.label: Epistemic trust and confidence
nodes.grounding_span: It knocks my confidence in AI each time it happens, and erodes any trustworthiness it has built up

nodes.label: Cautious trust in AI for bounded verifiable tasks
nodes.grounding_span: I don't trust AI to make that level of decisions yet

nodes.label: Frustration with AI hallucination
nodes.grounding_span: I have experienced frustration with AI when it makes up answers (hallucinates) and states them with such apparent confidence

nodes.label: Optimistic openness to increased delegation if uncertainty is signaled
nodes.grounding_span: if the models start stating when they are unsure of an answer rather than hallucinating, I will become more confident in increasing the number of steps

nodes.label: Reluctance to delegate high-accountability decisions
nodes.grounding_span: If it is a decision where the process would need to be understood and justified as it will potentially be questioned by stakeholders, then I will not be comfortable delegating this to AI

nodes.label: Step-by-step task decomposition with verification checkpoints
Experience-based sense-checking before delegation
nodes.grounding_span: If it is something that from my experience I can immediately sense-check the result
